name: Is workers comp different from suing for slip at work vs store?

mainEntity.name: Is workers comp different from suing for slip at work vs store?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: no-fault, limited damages; store: fault-based, full damages possible.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workplace slips use no-fault workers' comp for medical/wages only; public property slips allow negligence lawsuits for pain/suffering too. Comp faster but caps benefits[1][2]. Key factors: Comp exclusive remedy vs employer; third-party suits possible if contractor at fault. Store claims need prove owner notice of hazard. Comp bars employer suits.

description: Comp: no-fault, limited damages; store: fault-based, full damages possible.
